The Commissioner.'iSouth Delhi Municipal Corporation. Dr. SPM Civic Centre, New Delhi. 3. The Commissioner, East Delhi Municipal Corporation. Udyog Sadan, Patparganj, Delhi. . Sub: Amendment of Recruitment Rules for the post of Assistant Public Health Inspector for three Municipal Corporations Sir, ! am directed to find enclosed herewith Notification for amendment of Recruitment Rules for the post of Assistant Public Health Inspector for three Municipal Corporations which has been notified in Govt. Gazette on 08.11 2017 vide this office Notification No F4 (1)/RR./LB/2013/CD No 000199626/7635-42 under Section 98 & 480 of DMC Act 1957 for taking necessary action. Yours faithfully. W % 3 Pl+W, URBAN DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT NOTIFICATION Delhi, the 8th November, 2017 No.F.4(l)/RR/LB/2013/CD-000199626/7635-42—In exercise of the powers conferred by sections 98 and 480 of the Delhi Municipal Corporation Act, 1957, the Lt. Governor of the National Capital Territory of Delhi hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the recruitment regulations for the post of Assistant Public Health Inspector in North, South and East Delhi Municipal Corporations, 2014 notified vide No. F.4(l)/RR/LB/2013/3870-75 dated Delhi, the 14th August 2014. namely: — 1, j 1 Short title and commencement.-(l) These regulations may be called Recruitment Regulations for the post of Assistant Public Health Inspector in North, South and East Delhi Municipal Corporations (Amendment), 2017. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Delhi Gazette. 2. In the Recruitment Regulations for the post of Assistant Public Health Inspector in North, South and East Delhi Municipal Corporations, 2014. in rule 2 for the words "Pay Band and" Grade pay/scale of Pay", the words "Level in Pay Matrix" shall be substituted. 3. (a) In the Schedule annexed to the said Regulations, in column 4 for column heading and the entries relating thereto, the following columns heading and entries shall be substituted, namely :- Level in Pay Matrix Level 4 (Rs 25500-81100). (b) In column 11. for the existing entries, the following entries shall be substituted namely.- "Promotion from the grade in Level-1 of Pay Matrix (Rs.l 8000-56900) with eleven years of regular service in Public Health Cadre having, Sanitary Inspector Diploma from recognized Institute". By Order and in the Name of the Lt. Governor of the National Capital Territory of Delhi, PAWAN CHOPRA, Dy. Governor of the National Capital Territory of Delhi hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the recruitment regulations for the post of Assistant Public Health Inspector in North, South and East Delhi Municipal Corporations, 2014 notified- vide No. F.4(1)/RR/LB/2013/3870-75 dated Delhi, the 14th August 2014, namely:- 1. Short title and commencement.-(1) These regulations may b-e called Recruitment Regulations for the post: of Assistant Public Health Inspector in North, South and East Delhi Municipal Corporations (Amendment), 2017. (2) They shall come into force en the &c>Xe of their publication in the Delhi Gazette. 2. In the Recruitment Regulations for the post: of Assistant Public Health Inspector in North, South and East Delhi Municipal Corporations, 2014, in rule 2 for the words "Pay Band and Grade pay/scale of Pay", the words "Level in Pay Matrix" shall be substituted. 3. (a) In the Schedule annexed to the said Regulations, in column 4 for column heading and the entries relating thereto, the following columns heading and entries shall be substituted, namely :- Level in Pay Matrix 4 Level 4 (Rs 25500-81100"). -- 4 of 14 -- (b) In column 11, for the existing entries, the following entries shall be substituted namely:- "Promotion from the grade in LeveS-1 of Pay Matrix (Rs.18000-56900) with eleven years of regular service in Public Health Cadre having, Sanitary Inspector Diploma from recognized Institute". By order and in the n-ame of the Lt. Governor of the National Capital Territory of Delhi, IK*- ' .(Pawan Chopra) Deputy Director (Local Bodies) Copy forwarded to the:- 1. The Secretary to the Minister (UD)/Local Bodies, Govt, of NCT of Delhi. 4. The Principal Secretary (LJ&L.A), Govt of NCT of Delhi. 5. Director (Local Bodies), Govt, of NCT of Delhi. 6. Nitya Nand Sharma as Designated Officer by the Competent Authority i.e. Chief Secretary, Delhi, the Commissioner of Food. Safety, Department of Food Safety, in exercise of powers conferred under sub-section (1) of Section 36 of the Food Safety and Standards Act 2006, further appoints this Designated Officer to -be in-charge of Food Safety Administration for the entire area of National Capital Territory of Delhi. M ?Tcff ^rr 9 0Tn%snT; $& (ii) -a^tcSTrrT sra 1 otffoTH •5T c?T ^ S fo7oT& U^crdfa / Ufa faster / ftcWST 5 2 0 0 - 2 0 2 0 0 / - " 5 ^ t cTajT 1 8 0 C 7 - ^ t r £ £ $Z <n$ ^ t xr^IcSTfcr 3l 2. 1. 3WT 31Tg3rT ( W l ^ ) - 3TCZT$T. 2. ^nnr wi^yj 3#nsr# - •%&& 3 . folt"ra5 cfiT^fefS- -tic^a 4. n«tra1oTcR 3Tt£ra5r# (orsrscrrefr)- ?Terw 1 3. t yftfiqfcraT msm ml % 1crrj S i B ^ 3m 3TTOV7r 35T tTZTH?f fcTOT «TRT $ 1 oTTTj^ oTeft 3TTC. t f t . a f a l T , 3TqT fc^STcS, ¥£||4)%l faciei URBAN DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT N O T I F I C A T I O N Delhi, the 14th August, 2014 No.F.4(l)/RR/LB/2013/3870-75.—In exercise of the powers conferred by Sections 98, 480 and 484A (Hi) of the Delhi Municipal Corporation Act, 1957 and in supersession of the Regulations notified vide notification No. 9/9/83-LSG dated the 28th April, 1983 for the post'of Assistant JPublic Health Inspector ^except as respects things done or omitted to be done before such supersession, the Lt. Governor of National Ca^itai-Territory of Delhi is pleased to make the following regulations relating to the post of Assistant Public Health Inspector in North, South and East Delhi Municipal Corporations, namely:- I. Short title and commencement.-(l) These Regulations may be called the Recruitment Regulations for the post of Assistant Public Health Inspector in North, South and East Delhi Municipal Corporations, 2014. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in" the Delhi Gazette. 2. Number of post, classification, pay band and Grade pay/Scale of Pay: - The number of the said post, its classification, pay band and Grade pay/ Scale of pay attached thereto shall be as specified in columns 2 to 4 of the Schedule annexed to these regulations. 3. Method of recruitment, age-limit, qualifications etc. - The method of recruitment to the said post, age limit, qualifications and other matters relating thereto, shall be as specified in columns 5 to 13 of the said Schedule. -- 12 of 14 -- PART IV] DELHI GAZETTE: EXTRAORDINARY 4. Disqualification. - No person, - (a) Who has entered into or contracted a marriage with a person having a spouse living; or (b) Who having a spouse living, has entered into or contracted a marriage with any person, shall be eligible for appointment to any of the said posts: Provided that the Municipal Corporations of Delhi after prior consultation of Government of National Capital Territory of Delhi may if satisfied that such marriage is permissible under the personnel law applicable to such person and the other party to the marriage and that there are other grounds for so doing except any person from the operation of this regulation. •5. Power to relax: - Where the Government is of the opinion that it is necessary or expedient so to do, it may, by order, for reasons to be recorded in writing relax any of the provisions of these regulation with'respect . to any class or category of persons. 6. Saving. - Nothing in these regulations shall affect reservations, relaxation of age limit and other concessions required to be provided for candidates of Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, Ex-Servicemen and other special categories of persons, in accordance with the orders issued by central Government from time to. time, in this regard. SCHEDULE Name post. of 1 Number of post. Classification. ASS IS' PUBLIC illlALTI INSPRC A NT 4 TOIL 150* (2014) (North DMC South DMC East DMC 57 51 36 Pay band and Grade pay/Pay Scale. Category ' C •Subject to variation dependent on workload. PayBand-1, Rs. 5200-20200 plus Grade Pay- Rs.^900. Whether selection or non selection post. Not applicable Age limit for direct recruits. 6 Between 18 to 27 years. (Relaxable for Government Servants and employees of Municipal Corporation of Delhi upto 40 years in accordance with the orders and instruction of the Government). Also relaxable for Schedule Caste/ Schedule Tribe candidates for five years and three years for Other Backward Caste candidates. NOTE- The crucial date for determining the age limit shall be the closing date for receipt of appli-cations from candi-dates in India (and not the closing date prescribed for those in Assam, Meghalaya, Arunachal Pradesh, Mizoram, Manipur, Nagaland, Tripura, Sikkim, Ladakh Division of Jammu & Kashmir State, Lahaul & Spiti District and Pangi Sub Division of Chamba District of Himachal Pradesh, Andaman & Nicobar Islands or Lakshadweep). | Education and other qualifications required for direct recruits.
